## Security considerations

## How to test

```bash
# Example:
pnpm typecheck
pnpm test
pnpm build
```

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project style (prettier + eslint pass)
- [ ] I added tests for any new behavior
- [ ] All tests pass locally (`pnpm test`)
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm build` succeeds
- [ ] I updated documentation (README, docs/SECURITY.md, docs/CHANGELOG.md) if behavior changed
- [ ] I did NOT commit any secrets, `.env.local`, or private keys
- [ ] PR title follows Conventional Commits (`feat:`, `fix:`, `chore:`, etc.)
